title: Outcome-tracking dashboard (published/installable + adoption per deck)
context: Elyos measures success as outcomes delivered to beneficiaries. For open-flashcards, the sustainability metric is adoption: how many learners are installing and using the published decks. An outcome-tracking dashboard aggregates per-deck publication status, install counts, ratings, and quality metrics (from data-002) into a single view that maintainers can use to guide prioritization.
objective: Build an outcome-tracking dashboard that aggregates per-deck publication status, adoption metrics (installs/ratings), and quality metrics into a single, maintainer-readable view.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregates per-deck data: publication status, channel URL, install count / rating (where available from channel API), and quality metrics from the data-002 dataset.
Generates a dashboard view (static HTML or Markdown table) updated automatically on each release or on a schedule.
Includes a per-deck trend for reviewer-corrected rate and error-taxonomy mix over time.
Dashboard is hosted on the repository (e.g., GitHub Pages or output/ directory) with no external service dependency.
Does not log or expose any credentials or API keys; reads public channel APIs only.
output: A merged PR adding an outcome-tracking dashboard tool (tools/dashboard/) that generates a static dashboard from published metrics, with a CI workflow to update it on release; licensed MIT.
